note: Assembled summary. Superseded by the real prototype-tuned fcose params (see fcose-params.mjs provenance -- coordinator-recovered from prototypes/weave-prototype/frontend/src/lib/cytoscape.ts:106-114). Full raw arrays in raw-results-load.json (1k/5k/10k load+memory) and raw-results-drag.json (drag fps samples). The earlier library-default-params run (1k: 5/5 reps p95=19222.8ms; 5k: 1/5 reps 751211.4ms; 10k: 0/5, killed >42min no convergence) is preserved in git history (commit 2e0c160) and summarized below for comparison -- not repeated as live data here.
hardware: Apple Silicon dev box (see report.md for reference-hardware-profile disclosure)
fcoseParamsSource: Real prototype params (prototypes/weave-prototype/frontend/src/lib/cytoscape.ts:106-114), recovered by coordinator per TASK-001-blocker.md resolution -- not independently verified against source by the Engineer (Law 12)

5000.note: Single rep only (~2.3 min wall clock) -- see report.md 'Why reps were capped'.

10000.note: Single rep under a 10-minute kill-cap (converged at ~8.4 min, well inside the cap) -- unlike the library-default params, which never converged in 42+ minutes. See report.md.

drag1000.note: See raw-results-drag.json for the full sample array. p95 computed per the task brief's literal pseudocode (ascending sort, ceil(0.95n)-1 index) -- see report.md for the headless-Chromium-vsync and ascending-convention caveats.

previousRunWithLibraryDefaultParams.note: For comparison only -- see git history commit 2e0c160 for full raw data of this superseded run.
